disclaimer: DCDE program names, application windows, and prize amounts change frequently. Verify with the chamber before applying.

chamber.parent: Dubai Chambers (one of three: Commerce, International, Digital)

membership.summary: DCDE has no standalone membership scheme as of April 2026. Founders engage via specific programs (Dubai Founders HQ, Antler, FRWRDx, Create Apps).

dubai_chamber_of_commerce_separate.mandatory_for: Mainland commercial license holders (DET commercial activity)

programs.name: Dubai Founders HQ
programs.description: Phygital (physical + digital) platform connecting Dubai founders to ecosystem resources, mentorship, and government services.

programs.name: Antler Founder Residency
programs.description: Founder residency program in partnership with Antler. Focus on early-stage tech founders ready to build their next venture.

programs.name: FRWRDx
programs.description: 14-week accelerator program for selected digital economy startups.

programs.name: Unicorn 30 Programme
programs.description: Programme to identify and support 30 future unicorns from Dubai's tech ecosystem.

programs.name: Create Apps Championship

key_dates.grand_finale: 11 May 2026 at Museum of the Future

programs.notes: See createapps feature for full details.

programs.name: Canva Partnership
programs.description: Free or discounted Canva access for Dubai SMEs as part of the DCDE digital enablement initiative.
